description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Deploy that triggers on push events with tags matching 'v*'. Run a single job on a windows-latest environment that checks out the repository with submodules, sets up MSBuild and .NET Core 3.1.301, restores dependencies, builds Impostor.Client and Impostor.Server, runs tests, zips build artifacts, creates a new release, and uploads the zipped artifacts as release assets.
